  as={"h1"}

  children={"Upload a knowledge base file"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/knowledge-base/files/upload"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Upload a file and create a knowledge base file record

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"schema":{"type":"string"},"in":"query","name":"projectId","required":true}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"multipart/form-data":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"file":{"type":"object","properties":{"filename":{"type":"string"},"data":{},"type":{"type":"string","enum":["file"]},"mimetype":{"type":"string"}},"required":["filename","data","type"]},"displayName":{"type":"string"}},"required":["file","displayName"]}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Default Response"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
